Event: Titanic Excavation - Feb 2026
Event Date: 12/02/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: AR384
Riflemen's Squad Gear

Once in a while for 5 sec., when the armor wearer's health drops below 35%, this unit and all allied units start increasing their max health, physical and magic armor by 15% for 5 sec., and restore 15% health, whenever they attack. Stacks up to 5 times.

Requirements: 98-100
